marketplaceHome.bannerTitle: From field to trade — everything agriculture in one place
marketplaceHome.bannerSubtitle: Explore thousands of products from verified suppliers across the globe. Seeds, equipment, inputs and more — all with transparent pricing and direct quotations.

hero.headline: Connecting Global Agriculture Through Digital Intelligence
hero.subheadline: The professional B2B marketplace for agricultural trade — open, verified, built to scale.

trust.title: Backed by proven operators
trust.nxin: NXin Digital Intelligence — 10+ years in agricultural SaaS, IoT, and AI.
trust.oboya: Oboya Group — global agri-horticultural footprint in 90+ countries.
trust.badges: Verification tiers help you identify BASIC, VERIFIED, and PREMIUM partners.

footer.rights: © {year} Agrichip Digital Intelligence Pte. Ltd. All rights reserved.

about.title: About NxinMall
about.body: NxinMall is operated by Agrichip Digital Intelligence Pte. Ltd., a joint venture between NXin Digital Intelligence and the Oboya Group. The platform is an open, neutral B2B marketplace for global agricultural trade.

productsPage.title: Product catalog
productsPage.empty: No products yet — check back soon.

cart.title: Shopping cart
cart.miniDescription: Demo cart — nothing is charged or shipped.
cart.totalDemoHint: Converted to your display currency for preview only.

checkout.title: Checkout (demo)
checkout.demoNote: This checkout is a simulation. No payment is processed and no order is created.
checkout.payBoletoDesc: Bank slip with 3 business day due date. 2% discount.
checkout.successBody: In a real deployment this step would create an order and send confirmations. Your demo cart has been cleared.
checkout.pendingPixHint: Pay via PIX for instant confirmation
checkout.loginRequired: Sign in to complete your purchase
checkout.loginRequiredHint: Your cart is saved and will be here when you get back.

product.priceHint: Final price depends on MOQ, specs, and logistics.
product.addToCartError: This listing cannot be added (missing variant).
product.sidebarBody: Tell the supplier what you need (quantity/specs). You’ll get a response with lead time and terms.
product.noDescription: No description provided for this listing yet.
product.noSpecifications: No specifications provided for this listing yet.
product.noDocuments: No documents uploaded for this listing yet.
product.quoteMessagePlaceholder: Tell the supplier what you need (specs, destination, timeline)…
product.quoteSuccess: Request sent. The supplier will contact you soon.
product.quoteError: Could not send. Please check the fields and try again.

auth.verifyHint: Click the link we sent to your inbox.
auth.googleDemoHint: Demo login (no real Google account needed)
auth.signInAfterRegisterError: Account created — please sign in manually.
auth.demoUnavailable: Demo account unavailable. Run the database seed first.
auth.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue.

account.title: My account
account.removePurchaseConfirm: Remove this purchase from your history?

admin.productsSubtitle: Products are created under the seeded demo seller for layout testing.
admin.productFormError: Could not save. Check fields and try again.

demo.startDialogDescription: Choose how you want to navigate the platform tour.
demo.modeManualDescription: Move at your own pace with Back and Next.
demo.modeAutoDescription: The tour advances on its own after each step; you can pause anytime.

welcome.title: Welcome to NxinMall
welcome.body: A B2B ag marketplace. This tour walks through discovery, sign-up, and completing a purchase.

search.title: Global search
search.body: Use the search bar to find products, categories, and suppliers across the catalog.

categoryNav.title: All categories
categoryNav.body: Open the side panel to browse agribusiness segments without leaving the home page.

localeSettings.title: Language and currency
localeSettings.body: Change the interface language and the currency used to display prices for your region.

profileMenu.title: Account menu
profileMenu.body: Access personal details, addresses, orders, and the supplier dashboard when signed in.

categories.title: Categories
categories.body: Browse inputs, equipment, seeds, feed, technology, and services by segment.

products.title: Product catalog
products.body: Filter by category, sort by price or newest, and compare offers from multiple suppliers.

sellers.title: Supplier directory
sellers.body: Compare verified suppliers by country, product count, and reputation before you negotiate.

sellerOverview.title: Supplier profile
sellerOverview.body: See company details, verification badge, contact options, and performance metrics on the B2B marketplace.

sellerCategories.title: Catalog by category
sellerCategories.body: Filter this supplier's products by segment to find what you need quickly.

sellerCatalog.title: Supplier products
sellerCatalog.body: Browse their published catalog. Next we open a product from this supplier in detail.

pdp.title: Product page
pdp.body: View images, specs, price in your currency, and seller information.

addCart.title: Cart and favorites
addCart.body: Set quantity, add to cart, and save to favorites to compare later.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.body: Saved products stay here for quick access when you are ready to buy.

cart.title: Shopping cart
cart.body: Review items, quantities, and estimated total before checkout.

registerIntro.title: B2B registration
registerIntro.body: Buyers and sellers create an account to trade with B2B terms on NxinMall. Here is the sign-up form.

registerCredentials.title: Email and password
registerCredentials.body: Use a business email and a strong password. In the demo we fill in fictional values for you.

registerRole.title: Role and terms
registerRole.body: Choose buyer or seller and accept the terms of use to complete registration.

registerReview.title: Review sign-up
registerReview.body: Check your details before submitting. In the tour we do not submit the form — we only show the flow.

registerLogin.title: Demo sign-in
registerLogin.body: To continue the tour we use the demo buyer account. Click Next to sign in automatically.

accountWelcome.title: Signed in
accountWelcome.body: You are already authenticated. Next we visit your account, addresses, and complete a sample order.

personal.title: Personal data
personal.body: Keep name, phone, and tax ID updated. This data can auto-fill checkout.

addresses.title: Addresses
addresses.body: Save the delivery address used for freight quotes and order confirmation.

checkoutAddress.title: Checkout — address
checkoutAddress.body: Enter or confirm the delivery address. ZIP helps auto-fill city and street.

checkoutFreight.title: Checkout — freight
checkoutFreight.body: Pick a carrier or seller-arranged freight with simulated cost and lead time.

checkoutPayment.title: Checkout — payment
checkoutPayment.body: Boleto, PIX, and card with simulated discounts. Choose your B2B payment method.

checkoutReview.title: Checkout — review
checkoutReview.body: Verify items, address, freight, and payment. Next we simulate order confirmation.

checkoutDone.title: Order placed
checkoutDone.body: See payment instructions (boleto, PIX, or card) while the order stays pending in the demo.

purchases.title: My purchases
purchases.body: Track orders and payment status; you can manually confirm payment in the demo.

dashboard.title: Account dashboard
dashboard.body: Summary of recent purchases and shortcuts to keep shopping.

finish.title: Demo complete
finish.body: You completed the full NxinMall flow. Explore freely or restart the tour from the header.
